nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.task_description: Wire 15 remaining diagnostic scripts into nf-solve.cjs as sweeps or folds into existing sweeps
nf/quick-337-fast-path-initial-diagnosti.approach: Wire 15 diagnostic scripts into nf-solve.cjs as new sweeps or folds into existing sweeps, mapping each script to its target sweep function.
out_of_scope: Modifying the diagnostic scripts themselves or their internal logic
Updating nf-solve.cjs command-line interface or output format beyond table rendering
Testing or validation of the integrated sweeps
